---
title: "readme"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Readme

From Albert Rapp on [Github](https://3mw.albert-rapp.de/p/automate-anything-with-r-github-actions?utm_source=3mw.albert-rapp.de&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=3mw-automate-anything-with-r-github-actions&_bhlid=08bce53ce1320b0ebd946637575aa4e68af33dc5)     

```{r}
#| echo: false
current_time <- Sys.time() |> 
  format('%d/%m/%Y')
```

Hello, this file was rendered at `r current_time`
